channel.title: Çağatay Özcan Jagiello Gutt - website
channel.description: Cognitive Science Student (M.Sc.) & Molecular Biologist (B.Sc.) | Artificial Consciousness, BCI & HMI Research | Physiological Computing & AI

item.title: Website Update
item.author: Unknown
item.description:
This website has been updated with the following changes:

Recent Changes

  • 257b3c1 fix: use plain fetch for parquet (no range requests), scrollable README
  • 8759052 No auto-open on expand, .log.parquet as log files, all parquet only
  • 1492a88 Ignore dotfiles/dotdirs, per-repo pipeline data, cache v2
  • 5b965af Recursive tree rendering: mirror exact repo folder structure
  • 2fb75ff Flat folder discovery: show all files from results dirs, README at bottom

The site continues to sync automatically with GitHub (projects) and ORCID (publications).

View source on GitHub →
